creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #3)
Thanks, and sorry I missed that. It seems I still had llvm-ranlib on my WITH_LLVM_BINUTILS test machine from the original install, so did not notice that it was missing.

I found llvm-symbolizer had the same issue (for llvm-addr2line) and created a review in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D39747.
